cookieConsent.title: Cookie Consent
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to analyze website traffic and optimize your website experience. By accepting, you consent to the use of cookies for analytics purposes.

homeHero.title: Hi, I'm Ricardo Canul
homeHero.description: A passionate software developer specializing in web development. I create modern, responsive websites and applications that provide seamless user experiences.

homeAbout.title: About Me
homeAbout.header: Building Tomorrow's Backend and Optimizing Today's Frontend
description_paragraphs: Hi! I'm Ricardo Canul, a Full-Stack developer passionate about writing clean, efficient, and scalable code. I move fluently between backend development with PHP / Python and creating dynamic, responsive interfaces.

My focus isn't just on making things work, but making them work fast: I have proven experience auditing web performance and designing automated pipelines (Docker, Ansible, GitHub Actions) that make life easier for development teams. I live in Poland, speak Spanish, English and basic Polish, and am always ready to join collaborative teams where innovation and creative problem-solving are the priority.

phpDevelopment.title: PHP Development
phpDevelopment.description: Robust backend development focusing on modern ecosystems and enterprise solutions.

pythonDevelopment.title: Python Development
pythonDevelopment.description: Versatile programming for web APIs, automation, and data processing.

projectsPage.listingDescription: A collection of web applications and scalable systems developed with technical precision and a focus on user experience.

summary.description: Full-Stack Engineer with 4+ years of experience in web apps, monolithic and microservices architectures, responsive interfaces, and Docker workflows.

backendDevelopment.title: Backend Development
backendDevelopment.description: Expertise in building scalable server-side logic and complex business workflows.

apiDesign.title: API Design
apiDesign.description: Designing and implementing RESTful and GraphQL APIs with a focus on security and performance.

dataAndDevOps.title: Data & DevOps
dataAndDevOps.description: Managing data persistence and automating deployment pipelines for reliable delivery.

workExperience.title: Work Experience
workExperience.description: Professional trajectory in the development of high-impact technological products.

workExperienceList.title: Full Stack Software Engineer - Kiwee Software
descriptionPoints: Automated deployment pipelines by architecting CI/CD workflows with Github Actions, Ansible and Docker.
Made Improvements to the Storefront theme for Shopware 6
Perform major migration from Shopware 6.6 to 6.7, refactoring legacy codebases to ensure 100% compatibility
Led performance audit and execution seeing massive improvements in LCP (33.7%) and INP(74.5%).

workExperienceList.title: Full Stack PHP Developer - Affenbits
descriptionPoints: Developed and maintained websites using a proprietary CMS
Translated Figma designs into responsive frontend pages.
Implemented Docker to streamline team workflows, significantly automating local development and deployment processes.

workExperienceList.title: PHP Developer - Divante (Cloudflight)
descriptionPoints: Developed and maintained a Pimcore-based project for major shipment company.
Developed backend for an e-commerce platform that automated product bundling improving user experience and sales efficiency.
Developed KPI tool for internal team statistics using APIs from Gitlab, Jira, and Testrails.
Led Project migration to the latests BoltCMS version, updating business logic and migrating the database structure.

aboutPage.title:
Transforming ideas into
high-impact systems.
aboutPage.description: Software Engineer building robust and scalable digital ecosystems. I combine backend expertise with a results-driven mindset to optimize performance.

pythonForIA.title: Python for Artificial Intelligence
pythonForIA.description: Exploring the PyTorch and TensorFlow ecosystem to integrate predictive models into modern web applications. My goal is to transform raw data into intelligent interactive experiences.

migration.title: Legacy Systems Migration
migration.description: Modernizing critical systems to service-based architectures, ensuring business integrity while drastically improving performance.

webPerformance.title: Web Performance
webPerformance.description: Focused on Core Web Vitals and progressive loading. I strive for high performance, aiming for sub-second LCP whenever possible.

networking.title: Professional Networking
networking.description: I deeply value meaningful connections. I believe code is just a tool, and people are the ones who build real solutions. Always open to discussing architecture, open source, or new trends in the sector.
